slides.hook: AI agents are multiplying — but they can't talk to each other
slides.body: AI agents proliferate across sectors, yet lack standardization. They operate in closed environments, making interoperability a growing challenge as deployment expands.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal layout, black and white with blue accent. Left-aligned text, clean structure.
slides.source_topic_headline: DARPA Wants AI Agents to Talk to Each Other — and Nobody Has Figured Out How Yet

slides.hook: One company just bet its entire future on this
slides.body: HubSpot is betting its future on AI agents becoming primary CRM users. This move signals a major shift in enterprise software, defining the next generation of business applications.
slides.visual_direction: Minimal layout, black and white with orange accent. Left-aligned text, clean structure.
slides.source_topic_headline: HubSpot Goes All-In on AI Agents and Ditches Its Own Conference to Prove It
